commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bounded cursor-backed apply candidate selection, persists `results/apply-cursors` state, clears auto-selected item numbers before continuation, and stamps processed apply outcomes with `apply_checked_at` across workflow, runtime, and tests.

Reproducibility: Partly. Source inspection shows current main has no apply cursor rotation and selects proposed close records by number, but I did not run a temp-state apply reproduction because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof for live apply automation, not a narrow code repair that ClawSweeper should attempt.

target.title: fix: rotate apply queue batches
target.body:
﻿## Summary

- add bounded cursor-backed auto-selection for apply-existing proposed close candidates
- persist `results/apply-cursors/<target>.json` from each automatic apply checkpoint and clear auto-selected item numbers before continuation
- mark processed apply outcomes with `apply_checked_at`, including comment sync, label sync, policy skips, and closed records

## Existing PR Check

Checked open `openclaw/clawsweeper` PRs before implementation. The nearest overlaps were #350 (worker budget/caps), #341 (repair checkpoint contract), and #358 (decision packets), but none implement apply queue rotation, `apply_checked_at` coverage, or apply cursor persistence.

## Verification

- `pnpm run build:all`
- `node --test test/repair/workflow-utils.test.ts`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern "(workflow utilities rotate bounded apply candidate batches by apply cursor|workflow utilities write apply cursor from the last processed report item|apply workflow bounds checkpoints and requeues with a fresh token|apply-decisions counts advisory label-only syncs against the processed limit|apply-decisions syncs labels when first review placeholder advanced issue updated_at)" test/repair/workflow-utils.test.ts test/sweep-workflow.test.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check .github/workflows/sweep.yml src/clawsweeper.ts src/repair/workflow-utils.ts test/clawsweeper.test.ts test/repair/workflow-utils.test.ts test/sweep-workflow.test.ts`
- `pnpm run lint:repair`
- `pnpm run lint:src`
- `pnpm run lint:scripts`

Note: `node --test test/sweep-workflow.test.ts` still has an existing Windows checkout file-mode assertion failure in `read-only checkout mode restores file modes and leaves git metadata writable` (`292 !== 365`). The apply workflow tests in that file pass.
target.author: brokemac79
